title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: New Mansion Art Studio
content:
Complete Prep work for The Kortz Center Heist from your Mansion’s new Art Studio, which comes equipped with a Planning Board and an optional vault-hacking upgrade that allows you to practice before the real heist.

To purchase an Art Studio, head to prixluxuryrealestate.com, use the Mansion Services panel inside your Mansion, or head down to Basement Level 2. Upon purchase, this room becomes available in all owned Mansions.
